item.title: A blue sky, deep orange clouds, and wires and foliage in the foreground
item.description: A blue sky, deep orange clouds, and wires and foliage in the foreground

item.title: A video of Dana from behind standing outside of True History Brewery. She is wearing a pink skirt, black tube top, and her hair is up in a pink clip while she is smoking unaware she's being recorded. Inside the bar, the soccer game is playing.
item.description: A video of Dana from behind standing outside of True History Brewery. She is wearing a pink skirt, black tube top, and her hair is up in a pink clip while she is smoking unaware she's being recorded. Inside the bar, the soccer game is playing.

item.title: 'Our hands are coarse and full of words.—Bear with my telling you that God is not pretty.' - Clarice Lispector, The Passion According to G.H.
item.description: 'Our hands are coarse and full of words.—Bear with my telling you that God is not pretty.' - Clarice Lispector, The Passion According to G.H.

item.title: A mirror selfie of Dana with fresh bangs, sitting on her bed in a large plaid dress
item.description: A mirror selfie of Dana with fresh bangs, sitting on her bed in a large plaid dress

item.title: Apocalypse in 'X-Men 97' on Dana's TV with the caption 'The 1990s.'
item.description: Apocalypse in 'X-Men 97' on Dana's TV with the caption 'The 1990s.'

item.title: A blue sky with dappled white clouds
item.description: A blue sky with dappled white clouds

item.title: A young blonde girl crying and giving a peace sign sitting in a car seat with the caption 'Are you okay?'
item.description: A young blonde girl crying and giving a peace sign sitting in a car seat with the caption 'Are you okay?'

item.title: A blue-pink-orange sky at sunset, with streetcar wires in front that perfectly parallel the flight trail above
item.description: A blue-pink-orange sky at sunset, with streetcar wires in front that perfectly parallel the flight trail above

item.title: Laura Dern in 'Inland Empire' sitting on a chair in a pink dressing gown and looking miserable while six sex workers pose behind her
item.description: Laura Dern in 'Inland Empire' sitting on a chair in a pink dressing gown and looking miserable while six sex workers pose behind her

item.title: Gillian Anderson walking down a UK street in the 90s, fixing her blonde hair up-do, wearing a flowy white blouse, black low-rise pants, and carrying a black handbag
item.description: Gillian Anderson walking down a UK street in the 90s, fixing her blonde hair up-do, wearing a flowy white blouse, black low-rise pants, and carrying a black handbag
